description: You are a customer service manager for the Urban Electronics store. Using the admin credentials admin / Admin1234!, process three pending tickets: block the account for user 'mikewilson' (Mike Wilson) without deleting it; update the email address for 'janesmith' (Jane Smith) to 'jane.updated@example.com'; and create a new active user account for Sarah Johnson with username 'sarahjohnson', email 'sarah.johnson@example.com', password 'Customer456!', and a billing profile at 789 Oak Avenue, Chicago, IL 60601, US.
